description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:5.6-apache Docker image and defines three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a lint job that runs pear install PHP_CodeSniffer then phpcs. In the test stage add a test_integration job that uses the mysql:5 service, sets MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_HOST, MYSQL_USER, MYSQL_PASSWORD, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables, runs before_script commands: cp -r ./ /var/www/html/, env | grep _ | xargs -I {} echo "export \"{}\"" >> /etc/apache2/envvars, a2enmod rewrite, apt-get update && apt-get install -y linkchecker mysql-client, docker-php-ext-install mysql mysqli, apachectl start; then script commands: curl --fail http://localhost/setup.php, mv /var/www/html/config_sample.ini /var/www/html/config.ini, mysql -h$MYSQL_HOST -u$MYSQL_USER -p$MYSQL_PASSWORD $MYSQL_DATABASE < sql/schema.sql, and linkchecker http://localhost/. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, targets the production environment, and executes curl -v -H "x-gitlab-token: $X_GITLAB_TOKEN" https://www.hapitjeter.net/webhook_receive.php -d "$CI_COMMIT_SHA".
